sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33602" key="*)eleuqerai/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἐλευθεραί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <title_ TEIform="title">Eleutherae</title_>, on frontier of Attica and Boeotia:— hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἐλευθερεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, title of Dionysus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:38:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.38.8</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</entryFree>
